scripts.db:create:remote: pnpm exec wrangler d1 create ics-reminders --config worker/wrangler.remote.toml
scripts.db:execute:local: pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute ics-reminders --local --file worker/schema.sql --config worker/wrangler.local.toml
scripts.db:execute:remote: pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute ics-reminders --remote --file worker/schema.sql --config worker/wrangler.remote.toml
scripts.secret:put: pnpm exec wrangler secret put REMINDER_API_TOKEN --config worker/wrangler.remote.toml
